title: Arkangel AI Marketing Strategy & Brand Repositioning
summary: Daniel presented a brand audit revealing a critical disconnect between Arkangel AI's PR narrative (saving lives) and its web positioning (revenue/CFO focus). The team agreed to reposition Arkangel as the 'Bureaucracy Slayer' using an Iron Man archetype. José demonstrated the internal Content Engine (QMD), with tangible results expected in 3 months. The commercial model was set as revenue share adjusted for 6-9 month cycles, with a formal proposal pending NDA signature.

discussion_points.description: Daniel's brand audit revealed a critical gap between Arkangel's PR narrative (focused on saving lives) and its web positioning (targeting revenue/CFO personas). This misalignment undermines brand coherence and market trust.
Proposed repositioning Arkangel AI as the 'Bureaucracy Slayer' with an Iron Man archetype — projecting innovation, audacity, and real impact rather than generic corporate messaging.
José presented the internal Content Engine (QMD), an already-developed content generation and distribution system. Tangible results from this engine are expected within 3 months of implementation.
Revenue share model adjusted to 6-9 month cycles to match enterprise sales timelines. Enterprise pilot minimum set at >$60K, with a tiered offer scale of $99, $1K, and $25K.
The team explicitly rejected superficial corporate activities (events, vanity metrics) in favor of authentic, value-driven marketing that reflects the founders' real identity and mission.

action_items.description: Facilitate access to internal data and pipeline
Establish initial tracking and metrics baseline
Deliver formal proposal within 24 hours after NDA signing

decisions: Reposition Arkangel AI as 'Bureaucracy Slayer' with an Iron Man archetype
Reject superficial corporate activities; prioritize authenticity and real value
Adopt a revenue share commercial model adjusted for 6-9 month enterprise cycles
Require NDA signature before advancing to execution phase and data access
Enterprise pilot minimum threshold set at >$60,000
next_steps: Sign NDA to unlock access to Arkangel's internal data and pipeline
Daniel sends formal proposal with multiple engagement scenarios within 24 hours of NDA signing
Implement Content Engine (QMD) with initial metrics tracking
Begin brand repositioning execution once agreement is formalized
